mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_course (course_id, course_name, credit, hours, dept_code, teacher_id, capacity, enrolled_count, schedule_time, location, prerequisite, semester, status) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{credit}, #{hours}, #{deptCode}, #{teacherId}, #{capacity}, #{enrolledCount}, #{scheduleTime}, #{location}, #{prerequisite}, #{semester}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_course ORDER BY course_id
SELECT * FROM t_course WHERE semester=#{semester} ORDER BY course_id
SELECT * FROM t_course WHERE status='开放' AND enrolled_count < capacity ORDER BY course_id
mapper.update: UPDATE t_course SET enrolled_count = enrolled_count + 1 WHERE course_id=#{courseId} AND enrolled_count < capacity
UPDATE t_course SET enrolled_count = enrolled_count - 1 WHERE course_id=#{courseId} AND enrolled_count > 0
